$comment: MCP servers bridged into pi. Set enabled:false to skip one. ${ENV_VAR} is substituted from the environment at connect time. The bridge namespaces every tool as <server-key>__<tool>, so two Unity servers never collide on tool names.

unity.$comment: Commercial Coplay product (coplay-mcp-server, source: CoplayDev/coplay-unity-plugin). Disabled by default in favor of the open-source MCP for Unity below.

coplaydev-unity.$comment: Open-source MCP for Unity (CoplayDev/unity-mcp, PyPI: mcpforunityserver, script: mcp-for-unity). Requires the MCPForUnity Unity package installed and 'Start Server' in the Unity MCP window. Tools register as coplaydev_unity__*.
